sqlMap.select: select * from AreaOfTaxPracticeLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOTPKey = #AOTPKey#
sqlMap.insert: insert into AreaOfTaxPracticeLW(VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOTPKey PercentageValue AOTPCommentDesc LastUpdateUserID LastUpdateTimeStamp ) values (#VersionSequence:NUMERIC#, #PolicyKey:NUMERIC#, #AOTPKey:NUMERIC# #PercentageValue# #AOTPCommentDesc# #LastUpdateUserID# #LastUpdateTimeStamp# )
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, AOTPCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOTPKey from AreaOfTaxPracticeLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOTPKey = #AOTPKey#
sqlMap.update:
update AreaOfTaxPracticeLW set
PercentageValue = #PercentageValue# PercentageValue = null AOTPCommentDesc = #AOTPCommentDesc# AOTPCommentDesc = null LastUpdateUserID = #LastUpdateUserID# LastUpdateUserID = null LastUpdateTimeStamp = #LastUpdateTimeStamp# LastUpdateTimeStamp = null
where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOTPKey = #AOTPKey#
sqlMap.delete: delete from AreaOfTaxPracticeLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOTPKey = #AOTPKey#
delete from AreaOfTaxPracticeLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOTPKey = #AOTPKey#
sqlMap.select: select PercentageValue, AOTPCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp, VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOTPKey from AreaOfTaxPracticeLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOTPKey = #AOTPKey#

select VersionSequence, PolicyKey, AOTPKey, PercentageValue, AOTPCommentDesc, LastUpdateUserID, LastUpdateTimeStamp from AreaOfTaxPracticeLW where VersionSequence = #VersionSequence# and PolicyKey = #PolicyKey# and AOTPKey = #AOTPKey#
